title: Japanese Beef Sandwich
description: A simple and delicious sandwich recipe featuring thinly sliced Japanese beef, crispy lettuce, and tangy teriyaki sauce.
instructions: 1. Slice the beef into thin strips and season with salt and pepper.
2. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add the beef to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
4. While the beef is cooking, toast the buns in the oven or on the grill.
5. Spread a layer of mayonnaise on the bottom bun, if using.
6. Add a few slices of beef to the bottom bun.
7. Add a few leaves of lettuce on top of the beef.
8. Drizzle a little teriyaki sauce over the lettuce.
9. Add the top bun and serve immediately.
10. Garnish with pickled ginger, if using.
